posts.title: Left-wing Michigan Senate hopeful Abdul El-Sayed Wears Luxury $3,000 Watch While Campaigning Against the Wealthy

link_metadata.description: Left-wing Michigan Senate hopeful Abdul El-Sayed is running as a populist who rails against the wealthy. At the same time, he’s been photographed on the campaign trail wearing an array of luxury watches worth thousands of dollars, a Washington Free Beacon review found. El-Sayed has even bemoaned the "perverse psychological consequences" of Rolex advertisements along the Michigan freeway. "How many people who drive this road can actually afford one of those?" he asked in his 2020 book.
link_metadata.title: Abdul El-Sayed Wears Luxury Watches Worth Thousands While Campaigning Against the Wealthy
